title: garnotia villosa
intro: Garnotia villosa, also known as the hairy garnotia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. Garnotia villosa contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Garnotia villosa include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
